hero_desc: Frontend Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast building high-performance web experiences with a security-first mindset.
about_desc: I am Mohamed Abdallah, a Mathematics and Computer Science student at the Faculty of Science, Suez University. I am passionate about Frontend Development, Cybersecurity, and building modern web applications. I enjoy solving problems, learning new technologies, and continuously improving my skills through real-world projects.
skills_desc: Here are the technologies, tools, and professional skills I have learned and continue improving through continuous practice and real-world projects.
projects_desc: Here are some of the projects I have worked on during my learning journey, showcasing my skills in web development, artificial intelligence research, and academic presentations.
project1_desc: A modern responsive personal portfolio built using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Designed with Glassmorphism UI, reusable components, responsive layouts and clean architecture.
project2_desc: An academic presentation exploring bio-inspired artificial intelligence and wearable technology, highlighting intelligent systems, healthcare innovations and future AI applications.
journey_desc: Every picture marks a chapter. Every memory tells a story.

cert_card_desc: Currently focusing on building real projects, strengthening my programming skills, and preparing for professional certifications in Web Development and Cybersecurity.
